shellCommands.command: cat node_modules/next/dist/esm/export/next-cache.js 2>/dev/null; echo "==="; cat node_modules/next/cache.d.ts 2>/dev/null; echo "==="; cat node_modules/next/dist/cache/index.js 2>/dev/null | head -30

find node_modules/next -name "cache.d.ts" -path "*/next/*" | head -5 && echo "---" && cat node_modules/next/cache.d.ts 2>/dev/null || cat node_modules/next/dist/cache/index.d.ts 2>/dev/null || echo "checking..." && node -e "const m = require('next/cache'); console.log(Object.keys(m))" 2>/dev/null || echo "mjs"; node --input-type=module -e "import * as m from 'next/cache'; console.log(Object.keys(m))" 2>/dev/null
